verses.1: In the year that King Uzziah died, I saw the Lord seated on a throne, high and exalted; and the train of His robe filled the temple.
verses.2: Above Him stood seraphim, each having six wings: With two wings they covered their faces, with two they covered their feet, and with two they were flying.
verses.3: And they were calling out to one another:
verses.4: At the sound of their voices the doorposts and thresholds shook, and the temple was filled with smoke.
verses.6: Then one of the seraphim flew to me, and in his hand was a glowing coal that he had taken with tongs from the altar.
verses.7: And with it he touched my mouth and said:
verses.8: Then I heard the voice of the Lord saying: And I said:
verses.11: Then I asked: And He replied:
